summary: Add pec ente/storico/cerca (WS20/21/22) and aoo storico (WS19) commands.
reason: These WS18+ endpoints were previously documented as 'HTTP 500 server bugs' but actually failed because the PHP invocation path was used. With the correct REST endpoints they are functional.
validated_outcome: go build ./... passes. Live test against IPA pending (requires AUTH_ID).
